raw_consumer_statement: I received a XXXX XXXX monthly bill statement from XXXX XXXX with charges from their credit card. I knew there was a mistake, because, my account had a XXXX balance. I called the company, they gave me the runaround having me to call back several times to provide the same information. I called multiple times to open the fraudulent case. They would open the case and then close it stating the card was in my possession. I did not know the card was lost or missing. I do not carry my credit cards. The company verbally provided dates that charges went against the account. I sent documentation sharing I was not in town during one of the transactions. After that proof, the company wants to whole me liable for {$6000.00} plus of damages that are ruining my credit report. I asked them to review the cameras. They told me they would not and for me to call the local police. I filed a police report. I did not have an account balance and I did not make the charges. I need help.
